title: athlete-guardian — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing AthleteGuardian CRUD (nested under athletes) + verification workflow + primary-guardian swap + per-user guardianships surface. Every route carries `auth:sanctum` + `tenant.resolve` + policy check via the route-level `permission` metadata. The nested route shape (/athletes/{athlete}/guardians/{guardian}) makes the parent athlete explicit at every operation.

groups.name: tenant-guardians
groups.description: AthleteGuardian CRUD nested under the athlete. The {athlete} route param binds to a live Athlete (RESTRICT — cannot operate on archived athlete's guardians).

routes.description: List all guardians for the athlete. filter[verification_status], filter[is_primary], filter[has_legal_custody], filter[can_pickup], filter[can_receive_communications]. Guardians see only their own row via the .own scope.

Body: GuardianAddData { user_id, relationship, has_legal_custody, can_pickup, can_receive_communications, can_authorise_medical_care, is_primary }. Refused when tenant lacks athlete_multi_guardian AND athlete already has one guardian (GUARDIAN_TIER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED). Auto-dispatches VerifyGuardianByEmailDomainJob.
Body: GuardianUpdateData (excludes athlete_id, user_id, tenant_id [immutable], verification_status [dedicated endpoints], is_primary [use /set-primary]). Role flags update via this endpoint.

Soft-delete. Fires GuardianRemoved. When the removed guardian was primary, auto-elects a new primary + fires PrimaryGuardianChanged. Refused when this is the only active guardian for a MINOR athlete (GUARDIAN_MINOR_LAST_GUARDIAN).

Body may be empty. Atomic swap — demotes existing primary + promotes this guardian in one transaction. Refused when guardian.verification_status != 'verified' (returns PRIMARY_GUARDIAN_MUST_BE_VERIFIED).

Body: { verification_document_file_id? }. When athlete_guardian_verification entitlement is on, verification_document_file_id is REQUIRED. Transitions pending/disputed → verified with method='hr_manual'. Fires GuardianVerified. Enterprise-only path when the entitlement is on.
Body: { dispute_reason (required) }. Transitions verified → disputed. Blocks the guardian from acting as consent recorder for athlete consents. HR + safeguarding_officer + admin only.
Body: { revoke_reason (required) }. Terminal transition. Auto-flips is_primary to false + auto-elects a new primary. Fires GuardianVerificationRevoked + PrimaryGuardianChanged.

groups.name: tenant-my-guardianships
groups.description: The caller's own guardianships across every athlete in the current tenant. Feeds the parent-facing 'my responsibilities' surface.

routes.description: List every AthleteGuardian row where user_id = current_user_id. Filters by verification_status.

groups.name: platform-guardianships
groups.description: Cross-tenant read + verification audit for support tooling. Guardian names + athlete names for MINOR athletes are redacted per regulated_minor tier.

routes.description: Compliance-only export. Emits signed CSV of every verify/dispute/revoke action. Super_admin only.
